text:
大丈夫。
生臭い魚の臭いはついてないよ。

汚さず綺麗に片付ける姿勢は
他の連中にもいい手本になるね。

いつもいつも血生臭いアタシも
見習わなきゃいけないな。
It's all right. You don't smell fishy.

You set a fine example for your cohorts, wiping
away the filth without dirtying yourself.

I always reek of blood myself, so maybe
I should follow your lead as well.
Be seeing you.
